title: No Sleep, No Phantoms
description:
kicks you out of beds so you cant skip nights.
also no phantoms.
body:
kicks you out of beds so you cant skip nights. also no phantoms.

this mod is a part of another mod i made: [night constantly](https://modrinth.com/mod/night-constantly) I only made this version for people who still want the day and night cycle to be active.

my modrinth profile [auiki](https://modrinth.com/user/auikiouy)

If you have suggestions, questions or something of the like, my discord is auiki

(made with Mcreator)
